details.error: Expecting property name enclosed in double quotes: line 1 column 2 (char 1)
details.output:
Based on my thorough exploration of the repository, here is the phase plan:

---

# BeachGo-ReactWeb — Autonomous Improvement Phase Plan

## Phase 1: Critical / Blockers (Security & Runtime Breakage)

These must be fixed before any other work. Each is either a security hole or causes visible broken behavior.

| # | Task | Executor | File(s) |
|---|------|----------|---------|
| 1.1 | Rotate JWT secret — remove hardcoded `BeachRehberi_SuperSecret_Key_2026_Production!` from all `appsettings*.json`; replace with `Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("BEACHGO_JWT_SECRET")` only (no config fallback) | Claude CLI | `BeachRehberi.API/appsettings.json`, `BeachRehberi.API/appsettings.Development.json`, root `appsettings.json` |
| 1.2 | Add `appsettings.Development.json` to `.gitignore` | Claude CLI | `BeachRehberi.API/.gitignore` |
| 1.3 | Fix `Login.jsx` fallback redirect: `/home` → `/` | Claude CLI | `beach-ui/src/pages/Login.jsx:18` |
| 1.4 | Add `[AllowAnonymous]` to public `GET /` and `GET /{id}` on `BeachesController` — currently unreachable without a token, breaking anonymous browse | Claude CLI | `Controllers/BeachesController.cs` |
| 1.5 | Resolve SQLite DB name mismatch: root `appsettings.json` says `beachgo.db`, inner says `beachrehberi.db` — standardize to one | Claude CLI | `appsettings.json` (root) |

**Validation gate:** `dotnet build` passes, `npm run build` passes.

---

## Phase 2: Correctness & Security Hardening

| # | Task | Executor | File(s) |
|---|------|----------|---------|
| 2.1 | Deduplicate `baseURL` — export it once from `api/axios.js` and import into `token.js`, remove the copy | Claude CLI | `beach-ui/src/api/axios.js`, `beach-ui/src/api/token.js` |
| 2.2 | Eliminate duplicate auth logic — make `AuthContext.jsx` call `authService.js` functions instead of calling `api.post` directly | Claude CLI | `beach-ui/src/context/AuthContext.jsx` |
| 2.3 | Fix `Register.jsx` `setTimeout` leak — store return value and `clearTimeout` in a `useEffect` cleanup | Claude CLI | `beach-ui/src/pages/Register.jsx` |
| 2.4 | Remove dead `throw error` after `window.location.href` in `token.js` refresh failure handler | Claude CLI | `beach-ui/src/api/token.js` |
| 2.5 | Set `AllowedHosts` to specific domain(s) instead of `"*"` | Claude CLI | `BeachRehberi.API/appsettings.json` |
| 2.6 | Lock `UseForwardedHeaders()` to a trusted proxy — add `ForwardedHeadersOptions` with `KnownProxies` or restrict to loopback | Claude CLI | `BeachRehberi.API/BeachRehberi.API/Program.cs` |

**Validation gate:** `dotnet build`, `npm run build`, manual smoke test of login + beach browse.

---

## Phase 3: Maintainability & Refactor

| # | Task | Executor | File(s) |
|---|------|----------|---------|
| 3.1 | Consolidate duplicate `Controllers/` directories — determine if inner (`BeachRehberi.API/Controllers/`) or outer (`Controllers/`) set is authoritative; remove the unused set | Gemini CLI (second-pass analysis first) | Both `Controllers/` trees |
| 3.2 | Add `Content-Security-Policy` header; remove deprecated `X-XSS-Protection` header from the inline middleware in `Program.cs` | Claude CLI | `Program.cs` |
| 3.3 | Align refresh token expiry between root `appsettings.json` (30 days) and inner `appsettings.json` (7 days); pick one and document the choice | Claude CLI | Both `appsettings.json` files |
| 3.4 | Fix `GuestOnlyRoute` blank flash — return `<LoadingSpinner />` instead of `null` during `loading` state, matching `PrivateRoute` behavior | Claude CLI | `beach-ui/src/App.js` |
| 3.5 | Remove misleading `// PostgreSQL entegrasyonu` comment in `Program.cs` (actual driver is SQLite) | Claude CLI | `Program.cs` |

**Validation gate:** `dotnet build`, `npm run build`, `npm run lint` (if configured).

---

## Phase 4: Tests / Docs / Cleanup

| # | Task | Executor | File(s) |
|---|------|----------|---------|
| 4.1 | Add `.env.example` with all required env vars (`REACT_APP_API_URL`, `BEACHGO_JWT_SECRET`, `ADMIN_PASSWORD`, `Resend:ApiKey`, `Stripe:*`, `ApiKeys:*`) | Claude CLI | `beach-ui/.env.example`, root `.env.example` |
| 4.2 | Add `appsettings.Development.json` note to `AGENTS.md` explaining that this file must never be committed | Claude CLI | `AGENTS.md` |
| 4.3 | Verify `bin/Debug/` artifacts are properly gitignored (they appear committed) | Claude CLI | `.gitignore` |
| 4.4 | Remove root-level `node_modules/` if it is a stale artifact (investigate first — do not delete blindly) | Gemini CLI | root directory |

**Validation gate:** Clean `git status` after removing stale artifacts; `npm run build` still passes.

---

## Execution Rules (from AGENTS.md)

- Max 3 retries per failed task before escalating.
- Smallest safe diff per task — no scope creep.
- UTF-8 preserved on all writes; Turkish characters must not be corrupted.
- No phase begins until the previous phase's validation gate passes.
- All state written to log/state files after each task.

---

**Recommended starting point:** Task **1.1** (JWT secret removal) — it's the highest-severity security issue and unblocks correct environment setup for everything else.
